# PhD Researcher Position

**TU Berlin — Human-AI Interaction Lab**

We invite applications for a PhD Researcher position. The successful candidate will work on empirical studies of human-AI collaboration under Prof. Ada Lovelace.

## Requirements

- Python *(required)*
- English C1 *(required)*
- Research in AI *(desirable)*

## Conditions

- Salary: TV-L E13
- Contact: Professor Ada Lovelace — ada@example.org
